message:
feat(web): Add reusable visualization primitives for overlays

New primitives:
- ArcDiagram: Displays connections/interactions with curved arcs
- GenomeTrack: Linear genome visualization with regions and annotations
- HeatmapCanvas: High-performance canvas-based heatmap rendering
- ScatterCanvas: Interactive scatter plot with zoom/pan support

Improvements:
- Added types.ts with shared visualization types
- Created index.ts export barrel
- Updated ComparisonOverlay to use primitives
- Moved overlay-specific ScatterCanvas to use shared primitive

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
